raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"podcast_preference","confidence":0.94,"matched_text":"I was wondering if you could recommend some inspiring podcasts about entrepreneurship, aside from \"How I Built This\" which I've been listening to for months now.","distilled_fact":"The user is interested in inspiring podcasts about entrepreneurship and has been listening to \"How I Built This\" for months."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"podcast_listening_event","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"I just finished listening to a true crime podcast that my sister recommended to me on January 15th","distilled_fact":"The user finished listening to a true crime podcast that the user's sister recommended on January 15th."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"value_statement","confidence":0.74,"matched_text":"it got me thinking about how important it is to take risks and pursue my passions.","distilled_fact":"The user thinks it is important to take risks and pursue their passions."}]}
